Breakfast Catering Menu
Menu
Desayuno Criollo
Braised beef or Argentinian chorizo, fried arepas, sweet plantain, scrambled eggs, avocado, black beans.
Empanada de Jamon y Queso con Huevo
Smoked pit ham, fresco cheese, scrambled eggs. One per order
Empanada de Espinaca y Hongos con Queso
Skillet braised spinach and mushrooms tossed in bechamel, fresco cheese. One per order.
Arepa de Mananera
Smoked pit ham, queso fresco, scrambled egg. One per order
Arepa de Vegetales
Broccolini, queso fresco, scrambled egg.  One per order
Arepa de Vegano
Arepa stuffed with broccolini and black bans
Medialuna
Smoked pit ham & fresco cheese toasted in a fresh croissant • Add Egg
Pastries
Choose from assorted pastries fresh from Uruguayan bakery, Panderia Criolla. Check for today's selection.
Guava Pastelito
Our in-house specialty! Puff pastry filled with a sweet guava filling.
Beverages
Natalie's  Juice
Orange, Lemonade, or Blood Orange.

Traditional Uruguayan beef empanada, hard boiled eggs.

Platos
Pabellon

Ensalada Gaucha
Spinach, Bibb lettuce, red cabbage, red onion, tomato, boiled egg,  avocado queso fresco, vinagreta de aji • Add Chicken
Arroz Acevichado *
Heredia arroz, rosada, ceviche de pescado cebolla criolla, micro
cilantro.
Ceviche
Victoriano Ceviche *
Traditional Peruvian ceviche, sweet potatoes, butter lettuce, cebolla criolla, plantain chips, leche de tigre, habanero, cilantro oil.
Sanguches
Sanguche de Pollo
Grilled Springer Mountain chicken, butter lettuce, Georgia tomatoes, chimichurri, Duke's Mayo, tortuga bun - served with yucca fries.
Choripan
Grilled Argentinian chorizo, butter lettuce, Georgia tomatoes, chimichurri,
Duke's Mayo, tortuga bun - served with yucca fries.
Pan con Pescado
Fried fish, butter lettuce, cebolla criolla, tartara sauce, tortuga bun - served with yucca fries.
Olimpico de Miga
Traditional Uruguayan sandwich! Lettuce, tomato, bell pepper, ham, cheese, egg, Duke's -served with yucca fries.
Sanguche de Cangrejo Blando
Soft shell crab, butter lettuce, cebolla criolla, tartara sauce, tortuga bun
